text.title: MLP Planning Examples
text.summary: Worked end-to-end example showing the methodology applied on a representative case.

example.title: MLP plan lifts Day-30 retention from 22% to 38%
example.note: Illustrates four-layer-audit + delight-only-when-base-ge-3 + emotion-evidence-required + retention-curve-as-gate + delight-sprint-bounded.

example.title: Delight on broken base; unbounded polish sprint
